Steps.noSteps: This recipe has no steps recorded.

pancakes-esponjosos-con-miel.title: Fluffy Pancakes with Honey
pancakes-esponjosos-con-miel.description: Perfect pancakes to start the day, fluffy and served with honey.
steps: Mix the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.
In another bowl, beat the eggs together with the milk and melted butter.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until you get a smooth batter without over-mixing.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and pour portions of batter.
Cook each pancake until bubbles appear on the surface, flip and cook 1 more minute.
Serve hot with honey to taste.

pasta-carbonara-autentica.title: Authentic Pasta Carbonara
pasta-carbonara-autentica.description: Traditional Italian recipe with egg and pancetta for a creamy carbonara.
steps: Cook the spaghetti in salted water until al dente, reserve 1 cup of the cooking water.
Fry the pancetta in a skillet with a little oil until golden and crispy.
Beat the eggs with the grated pecorino cheese and generous pepper in a bowl.
Remove the skillet from heat, add the drained pasta and mix with the pancetta.
Add the egg and cheese mixture, stirring quickly. Gradually add cooking water to achieve a creamy sauce.
Serve immediately with more cheese and pepper.

torta-de-chocolate-decadente.title: Decadent Chocolate Cake
torta-de-chocolate-decadente.description: Irresistible chocolate dessert for special occasions.
steps: Preheat the oven to 180 °C and grease a 22 cm round pan.
Melt the chocolate with the butter using a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second intervals.
Beat the sugar with the eggs until you get a pale and fluffy mixture.
Add the melted chocolate and vanilla extract to the egg mixture.
Add the sifted flour and salt, folding gently.
Pour into the pan and bake 30-35 minutes. The center should remain slightly moist.
Let cool completely before unmolding. Decorate with cocoa powder, cream, and fruits.

ensalada-mediterranea-fresca.title: Fresh Mediterranean Salad
ensalada-mediterranea-fresca.description: Healthy and delicious salad with fresh ingredients and citrus dressing.
steps: Wash and thoroughly dry all the vegetables.
Chop the lettuce into pieces, slice the cucumber into rounds, halve the cherry tomatoes, and cut the onion into thin rings.
Place all the vegetables in a large salad bowl.
Add the crumbled feta cheese and black olives.
Prepare the dressing by mixing olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Pour the dressing over the salad just before serving.

pollo-a-la-parrilla-con-hierbas.title: Grilled Chicken with Herbs
pollo-a-la-parrilla-con-hierbas.description: Juicy chicken marinated with aromatic herbs and cooked on the grill.
steps: Mix the olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, rosemary, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Marinate the chicken in this mixture for at least 1 hour (overnight in the fridge is best).
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Cook the chicken about 20-25 minutes per side, depending on thickness, until fully cooked.
Optional: brush with honey during the last 5 minutes for a caramelized glaze.
Let rest for 5 minutes before serving.

bowl-de-smoothie-tropical.title: Tropical Smoothie Bowl
bowl-de-smoothie-tropical.description: Energizing tropical fruit bowl perfect for breakfast or a snack.
steps: Place the frozen banana, mango, pineapple, and plant-based milk in a blender.
Blend until thick and creamy. If needed, add more plant-based milk.
Pour the mixture into a bowl.
Top with granola, chia seeds, and fresh fruits to taste.
Serve immediately.

tacos-de-carne-asada.title: Grilled Beef Tacos
tacos-de-carne-asada.description: Authentic Mexican tacos with marinated beef, onion, and cilantro.
steps: Marinate the beef with soy sauce, garlic, cumin, salt, pepper, and oil for 30 minutes.
Heat a skillet or grill over high heat and cook the meat 3-4 minutes per side.
Let the meat rest for 5 minutes, then cut it into strips or small cubes.
Warm the tortillas in a dry skillet for 30 seconds per side.
Assemble the tacos with the meat, chopped onion and cilantro, and a squeeze of lime.
Serve with fresh cheese and chili peppers to taste.

sushi-rolls-caseros.title: Homemade Sushi Rolls
sushi-rolls-caseros.description: Learn to make sushi at home with this detailed step-by-step recipe.
steps: Cook the sushi rice and season it with rice vinegar, sugar, and salt. Let it cool.
Place a sheet of nori seaweed on the rolling mat.
Spread a thin layer of rice over the seaweed, leaving 2 cm free at the top edge.
Place the fillings (salmon, cucumber, avocado) in the center.
Roll using the mat, pressing firmly.
Cut the roll into 8 pieces with a knife dipped in water. Serve with soy sauce, wasabi, and ginger.

pizza-margherita-clasica.title: Classic Margherita Pizza
pizza-margherita-clasica.description: Simple and delicious Italian pizza with fresh basil and mozzarella.
steps: Preheat the oven to 250 °C with the baking tray inside.
Stretch the dough on a floured surface until you get a thin circle.
Spread the tomato sauce leaving a 1 cm border free.
Distribute irregular pieces of mozzarella over the sauce.
Bake 8-10 minutes until the edges are golden and the cheese is bubbly.
Remove from the oven, add fresh basil leaves, a drizzle of olive oil, and serve.

tiramisu-tradicional.title: Traditional Tiramisu
tiramisu-tradicional.description: Classic Italian dessert made with coffee and mascarpone.
steps: Separate the yolks from the whites. Beat the yolks with the sugar until you get a pale cream.
Add the mascarpone to the yolks and mix until combined.
Whip the egg whites to stiff peaks and fold them in gently.
Prepare the coffee and add the liqueur if desired. Let it cool.
Briefly dip each ladyfinger in the coffee and place a layer in the mold.
Spread a layer of mascarpone cream. Repeat the layers and finish with cream.
Refrigerate for at least 4 hours. Dust with cocoa powder just before serving.

sopa-de-verduras-casera.title: Homemade Vegetable Soup
sopa-de-verduras-casera.description: Comforting soup full of fresh vegetables and homemade flavor.
steps: Peel and cut all the vegetables into medium-sized pieces.
Sauté the onion and garlic in a pot with olive oil over medium heat until translucent.
Add the carrot, celery, and potatoes. Sauté for 3 more minutes.
Add the tomato, zucchini, and vegetable broth.
Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and cook for 20 minutes until all vegetables are tender.
Adjust salt, pepper, and spices. Serve with freshly chopped parsley.

hamburguesa-gourmet-completa.title: Complete Gourmet Burger
hamburguesa-gourmet-completa.description: Juicy burger with all the classic and gourmet toppings.
steps: Form 4 beef patties of about 180 g each. Season with salt and pepper.
Cook the bacon in a skillet until crispy. Set aside.
In the same skillet over high heat, cook the patties 3-4 minutes per side.
Add the cheddar cheese in the last minute and cover so it melts.
Toast the brioche buns in the skillet with a little butter.
Assemble the burger: bun, special sauce, lettuce, tomato, patty with cheese, caramelized onion, bacon, and pickles.

crepes-de-espinaca-y-ricotta.title: Spinach and Ricotta Crepes
crepes-de-espinaca-y-ricotta.description: Delicate crepes filled with sautéed spinach and ricotta cheese, ideal as a starter.
steps: Mix the flour, eggs, and milk until you get a smooth batter. Rest for 15 minutes.
Sauté the minced garlic in olive oil. Add the spinach and cook until wilted.
Mix the spinach with the ricotta, salt, and pepper to taste.
Cook the crepes in a lightly greased non-stick skillet, 1-2 minutes per side.
Fill each crepe with the spinach and ricotta mixture and fold into quarters or roll up.
Serve hot, optionally with tomato sauce or baked au gratin.

gulash-hungaro-tradicional.title: Traditional Hungarian Goulash
gulash-hungaro-tradicional.description: Robust beef stew with paprika and vegetables, comforting and full of flavor.
steps: Sear the meat in a pot with hot oil until browned on all sides. Remove and set aside.
In the same pot, sauté the onion and bell peppers until soft.
Add the sweet paprika and stir for 1 minute, being careful not to burn it.
Add the meat, carrots, chopped tomatoes, and broth to cover.
Bring to a boil, cover, and cook over low heat for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
Adjust salt and pepper. Serve with bread or pasta.

arepas-rellenas-de-queso-y-aguacate.title: Cheese and Avocado Stuffed Arepas
arepas-rellenas-de-queso-y-aguacate.description: Crispy on the outside and soft on the inside arepas, stuffed with melted cheese and avocado.
steps: Mix the corn flour with warm water and salt until you get a workable dough. Rest for 5 minutes.
Form medium balls and flatten them into discs about 1.5 cm thick.
Cook in a skillet with butter over medium heat 5-6 minutes per side until golden.
Carefully open each arepa in half.
Fill with shredded white cheese and avocado slices.
Serve immediately while the cheese is still melted.

crema-de-calabaza-con-jengibre.title: Butternut Squash Soup with Ginger
crema-de-calabaza-con-jengibre.description: Creamy and aromatic soup with a touch of fresh ginger.
steps: Peel the squash, remove the seeds, and cut it into cubes.
Sauté the onion and grated ginger in olive oil until tender.
Add the squash and vegetable broth to cover.
Cook over medium heat for 20 minutes until the squash is very soft.
Blend until smooth. Adjust the consistency with more broth if needed.
Add the heavy cream if desired. Adjust salt and pepper and serve hot.

milhojas-de-berenjena-y-queso-de-cabra.title: Eggplant and Goat Cheese Napoleon
milhojas-de-berenjena-y-queso-de-cabra.description: Layers of roasted eggplant and goat cheese with balsamic reduction.
steps: Cut the eggplants into 1 cm slices. Salt them and let rest for 15 minutes to draw out the bitterness.
Pat the slices dry and grill them on a griddle with olive oil until golden on both sides.
Reduce the balsamic vinegar in a saucepan over low heat until it reaches a syrupy consistency.
Assemble the napoleons by alternating eggplant slices and goat cheese slices.
Drizzle with the balsamic reduction and a drizzle of honey.
Sprinkle with fresh thyme and serve warm.

chai-latte-especiado.title: Spiced Chai Latte
chai-latte-especiado.description: Hot beverage with black tea and a blend of spices — ideal for cold mornings.
steps: Boil the water with the cinnamon, crushed cardamom, and cloves for 3 minutes.
Add the tea bags and let steep for 2 minutes. Remove the bags.
Add the milk and heat without letting it boil.
Sweeten with sugar or honey to taste.
Strain the drink and serve in warm cups.

falafel-crujiente-con-salsa-de-yogurt.title: Crispy Falafel with Yogurt Sauce
falafel-crujiente-con-salsa-de-yogurt.description: Spiced chickpea balls, crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, served with yogurt.
steps: Drain the soaked chickpeas (not cooked) and process them in a food processor with the onion, garlic, cilantro, cumin, and turmeric.
The mixture should be grainy but cohesive. Add flour if needed to bind.
Refrigerate the mixture for 30 minutes. Form walnut-sized balls.
Fry in hot oil at 175 °C for 3-4 minutes until golden.
Drain on paper towels.
Serve with plain yogurt seasoned with garlic, lemon, and herbs.

paella-de-mariscos-clasica.title: Classic Seafood Paella
paella-de-mariscos-clasica.description: Traditional paella with fluffy rice, fresh seafood, and saffron.
steps: Heat the broth and dissolve the saffron in it. Keep it warm.
Sauté the onion and bell pepper in oil in the paella pan over medium heat.
Add the squid and sauté for 2 minutes. Add the rice and mix well.
Pour in the hot broth, distribute the shrimp and mussels over the rice.
Cook over medium-high heat for 10 minutes, then reduce to low heat for 8 more minutes without stirring.
Remove from heat and cover with a clean cloth for 5 minutes before serving.

muffins-de-arandanos-integrales.title: Whole Wheat Blueberry Muffins
muffins-de-arandanos-integrales.description: Soft muffins made with whole wheat flour and fresh blueberries — a healthier breakfast option.
steps: Preheat the oven to 190 °C and place liners in a muffin pan.
Mix the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
In another bowl, beat the eggs with the milk and oil.
Combine the wet ingredients with the dry ones, mixing just until incorporated (do not over-mix).
Fold in the blueberries gently.
Fill the molds 3/4 full and bake 20-22 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean.

ceviche-de-camaron-con-limon-y-aji.title: Shrimp Ceviche with Lime and Chili Pepper
ceviche-de-camaron-con-limon-y-aji.description: Fresh and tangy ceviche with marinated shrimp and a spicy chili kick.
steps: Cut the shrimp into medium pieces if they are large.
Mix the shrimp with the freshly squeezed lime juice and let marinate for 10 minutes.
Cut the red onion into thin julienne strips and rinse in cold water to soften the flavor.
Mix the onion, chopped chili pepper, and cilantro with the marinated shrimp.
Adjust salt to taste.
Serve immediately with toasted corn if desired.

risotto-de-setas-silvestres.title: Wild Mushroom Risotto
risotto-de-setas-silvestres.description: Creamy risotto with a mix of mushrooms, Parmesan, and white wine.
steps: Sauté the chopped onion in oil and half the butter over medium heat until translucent.
Add the arborio rice and toast for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Pour in the white wine and stir until it evaporates.
Add the hot broth one ladle at a time, waiting for it to be absorbed before adding more.
Meanwhile, sauté the mushrooms in a separate skillet with oil, salt, and pepper.
When the rice is creamy and al dente, turn off the heat. Stir in the remaining butter, Parmesan, and mushrooms. Adjust salt.

bao-de-pulled-pork-con-salsa-hoisin.title: Pulled Pork Bao with Hoisin Sauce
bao-de-pulled-pork-con-salsa-hoisin.description: Steamed buns filled with shredded pork and hoisin sauce, Asian street food.
steps: Marinate the pork loin with soy sauce, garlic, and grated ginger for 1 hour.
Cook the meat in a pressure cooker for 45 minutes or in the oven at 160 °C for 2 hours.
Shred the meat with two forks when tender.
Mix the shredded meat with hoisin sauce to taste.
Steam the bao buns for 5 minutes.
Fill each bao with the pulled pork, cucumber strips, and scallions. Serve hot.

brownie-vegan-sin-gluten.title: Vegan Gluten-Free Brownie
brownie-vegan-sin-gluten.description: Intense chocolate brownies, 100% vegan and gluten-free, dense and moist.
steps: Preheat the oven to 175 °C and line a square pan with parchment paper.
Mix the melted coconut oil with the coconut sugar and applesauce.
Add the almond flour, cocoa, baking powder, and salt. Mix until combined.
Fold in the chocolate chips and pour the mixture into the pan.
Bake 22-25 minutes. The center should remain slightly moist.
Let cool completely before cutting into 9 portions.

ensalada-de-quinoa-con-vegetales-asados.title: Quinoa Salad with Roasted Vegetables
ensalada-de-quinoa-con-vegetales-asados.description: Nutritious quinoa salad with eggplant, zucchini, and roasted bell pepper.
steps: Cook the quinoa according to package instructions. Let it cool.
Cut the eggplant, zucchini, and bell pepper into cubes. Season with oil, salt, and pepper.
Roast the vegetables in the oven at 200 °C for 20 minutes until golden.
Mix the quinoa with the roasted vegetables.
Dress with olive oil, lemon juice, and chopped parsley.
Serve at room temperature or chilled.

polenta-cremosa-con-champinones.title: Creamy Polenta with Mushrooms
polenta-cremosa-con-champinones.description: Soft and creamy polenta served with sautéed mushrooms and garlic.
steps: Bring the broth to a boil in a pot.
Add the polenta in a steady stream, stirring constantly to prevent lumps.
Cook over low heat for 20 minutes, stirring frequently until the polenta pulls away from the sides of the pot.
Stir in the butter and Parmesan. Adjust salt.
Sauté the sliced mushrooms with minced garlic in a skillet with oil until golden.
Serve the polenta in shallow bowls topped with the mushrooms and chopped parsley.
